title: versioning — notification classes + categories
description: 2 Notification classes + 2 categories registered with the notifications core. Fired when a DeprecationNotice publishes with notify_customers=true.

categories.description: Notifies tenant admins when an API version they use is scheduled for sunset. Includes migration guide URL + affected endpoints/events. Cannot be opted out (transactional).
Final notification when an API version transitions to sunset. Includes list of paused subscriptions + upgrade path taken. Cannot be opted out.
